200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, pushes out ice spikes under 3 random enemies, dealing 65000 damage. The frostbitten enemies take 30% more damage and have their attack speed reduced by 30%. The frostbite will wear off after they perform 2 attacks each.

description 4/6

Once in a while, pushes out ice spikes under 3 random enemies, dealing 75000 damage. The frostbitten enemies take 35% more damage and have their attack speed reduced by 40%. The frostbite will wear off after they perform 2 attacks each. When attacking the frostbitten enemy has a 50% chance of being frozen; they will be immobilized, and their abilities’ cooldown will be suspended for 2 sec. Once in a while, deals an extra 50000 damage to the target. 130% of the damage done restores health in the Frost Death. This blow strikes the target off balance, preventing it from dodging or delivering a critical hit for 3 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, pushes out ice spikes under 3 random enemies, dealing 200000 damage. The frostbitten enemies take 40% more damage and have their attack speed reduced by 75%. The frostbite will wear off after they perform 2 attacks each. When attacking, the frostbitten enemy has a 50% chance of being frozen; they will be immobilized, and their abilities cooldown will be suspended for 3 sec. Once in a while, deals an extra 80000 damage to the target. 140% of the damage done restores health in the Frost Death. This blow strikes the target off balance, preventing it from dodging or delivering a critical hit for 3 sec. Once in a while, begins to drain enemies’ health. All enemies lose 100000 health over 3,3 sec. Once the effect has worn off, Death will claim 50% of the health drained, restoring own health, while another 50% of the health drained will be released as damage done to Frost Death’s target. Critical hits reduce the cooldown time of health drain by 1 sec. Triggers once per 3 sec or even more seldom.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Frost Death’s damage to frozen enemies is increased by 25%. The preferred target of the Frost Death’s attack are frozen enemies.

description 4/6

Frost Death’s damage to frozen enemies is increased by 25%. The preferred target of the Frost Death’s attack are frozen enemies. Frost Death’s icy spikes ignore armor and deal additional damage equal to 70% of the Frost Death’s attack.

description 6/6

Frost Death’s damage to frozen enemies is increased by 25%. The preferred target of the Frost Death’s attack are frozen enemies. Frost Death’s icy spikes ignore armor and deal additional damage equal to 70% of the Frost Death’s attack. In addition to stealing health, Frost Death steals 5% basic damage every second for 3,3 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Frost Death cannot be frozen.

description 4/6

Frost Death cannot be frozen. When an ally is frozen, that unit gains a shield that blocks 40% of any incoming damage for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Frost Death cannot be frozen. When an ally is frozen, that unit gains a shield that blocks 40% of any incoming damage for 5 sec. Frost Death takes 15% less damage for the duration of the battle. For each frozen enemy on the battlefield, the damage dealt to Frost Death is reduced by another 15%. Up to 3 effects.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Frostbitten enemies have crit and dodge reduced by 30% for 2 sec.

description 4/6

Frostbitten enemies have crit and dodge reduced by 30% for 2 sec. In addition to making the target lose balance, Frost Death blinds the target and reduces its damage by 30% for 5 sec. A blinded enemy has 60% chance to miss an attack.

description 6/6

Frostbitten enemies have crit and dodge reduced by 30% for 2 sec. In addition to making the target lose balance, Frost Death blinds the target and reduces its damage by 30% for 5 sec. A blinded enemy has 60% chance to miss an attack. Frost Death’s critical shots reduce the cooldown of icy spikes. Can only trigger once every 1 sec.

Materials

Ice Cream of Spite
Ice of Discord
